base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of princess_rescue_message_screen — a ui (cutscene) from 1985 super mario bros. End-of-8-4-castle final dialog — 'THANK YOU \[MARIO/LUIGI\]! YOUR QUEST IS OVER. WE PRESENT YOU A NEW QUEST. PUSH BUTTON B TO SELECT A WORLD' text below Princess NPC sprite. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: End-of-8-4-castle final dialog — 'THANK YOU \[MARIO/LUIGI\]! YOUR QUEST IS OVER. WE PRESENT YOU A NEW QUEST. PUSH BUTTON B TO SELECT A WORLD' text below Princess NPC sprite; unlocks Second Quest mode
